image:image.image:title: Oliver Square branded social preview image
image:image.image:caption: Oliver Square shopping plaza — storage units, contractor bays, and retail in Uniontown, PA

image:image.image:title: Oliver Square aerial view — shopping plaza in Uniontown, PA
image:image.image:caption: Aerial drone photo of Oliver Square plaza at 6 Oliver Road, Uniontown, PA 15401

image:image.image:title: Drive-up contractor bay with automatic door
image:image.image:caption: Storage unit with automatic door opener, drive-up access for boats, RVs, and trucks

image:image.image:title: Interior of a storage bay showing automatic door opener and LED lighting
image:image.image:caption: Every bay includes automatic door opener, LED lighting, and electrical service

image:image.image:title: 870 sq ft storage bay showing 60 foot depth
image:image.image:caption: Units 1-11 are 60 ft deep by 14.5 ft wide — ideal for boats, RVs, and trailers

image:image.image:title: Oliver Square Plaza pylon sign
image:image.image:caption: Oliver Square Plaza sign on Oliver Road in Uniontown, PA
